title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
